---
name: Memory Quality
about: Odyssey remembered something incorrectly, missed an important fact, or recalled irrelevant context
title: "[Memory] "
labels: memory-quality
---

**What went wrong?**
Describe the memory issue (e.g., wrong recall, missed fact, irrelevant context surfaced).

**What you said (paraphrased)**
Summarize the relevant part of your conversation. Do not paste private content verbatim.

**What Odyssey remembered / should have remembered**
Describe the gap between what happened and what you expected.

**Environment**
- Odyssey version:
- Model provider and model name:
- Approximate conversation length before the issue:

**Privacy reminder**
Do not paste full memory files, private conversations, or vault paths. Paraphrase the content that triggered the issue.
